game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept:
Lost at sea 1803 ~ The good ship Obra Dinn. LOST AT SEA, 1803
the good ship
"OBRA DINN"
----------------
Built 1796, London ~ 800 tons, 18ft draught
Captain R. WITTEREL ~ Crew 51 men
Last voyage to Orient ~ Cape rendezvous unmet
----------------
Contact East India Cy. London Office
for enquiries or testimony

An Insurance Adventure with Minimal Color


In 1802, the merchant ship Obra Dinn set out from London for the Orient with over 200 tons of trade goods. Six months later it hadn't met its rendezvous point at the Cape of Good Hope and was declared lost at sea.

Early this morning of October 14th, 1807, the Obra Dinn drifted into port at Falmouth with damaged sails and no visible crew. As insurance investigator for the East India Company's London Office, dispatch immediately to Falmouth, find means to board the ship, and prepare an assessment of damages.

Return of the Obra Dinn is a first-person mystery adventure based on exploration and logical deduction.
game_info.description: You are an insurance investigator dispatched to the mysteriously returned merchant ship Obra Dinn. The crew has vanished, and the ship is adrift with only scattered clues remaining. Navigate the ship's deck using a first-person view, discover 8 hidden clues about the crew's fate, and piece together what happened. Beware of hostile spirits that haunt the vessel - they will chase you if they spot you. Find all clues and escape through the exit portal to complete your investigation.
game_info.controls: Arrow Keys: Move forward/backward and turn left/right • Space: Interact with clues and exit portal • Shift: Sprint (move faster, but makes more noise) • ESC: Pause/Unpause game • R: Return to start screen • ENTER: Start game from title screen

TEST_1.test_description: Basic movement and interaction testing. Validates that the player can move around the deck, the camera rotates properly, and the player can interact with clues when in range.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Move the player in various directions using arrow keys, rotate to explore different angles, and attempt to interact with nearby clues using the space key. Test sprint functionality with shift key.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Player position updates correctly with arrow key inputs. Camera rotation works smoothly. Clues are discovered when player presses space near them. Sprint increases movement speed. No collision or movement bugs occur.

TEST_1.expected: Player position updates correctly with arrow key inputs. Camera rotation works smoothly. Clues are discovered when player presses space near them. Sprint increases movement speed. No collision or movement bugs occur.

TEST_2.test_description: Win condition testing - optimal path to victory. Tests the complete gameplay loop from start to collecting all clues while avoiding spirits, then reaching the exit portal.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Navigate efficiently to all 8 clue locations across the ship deck. Monitor spirit positions and plan movement to avoid detection. Use sprint strategically when safe. After collecting all clues, locate and activate the exit portal to win.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully collects all 8 clues without being caught by spirits. Finds the exit portal that appears after all clues are collected. Activates portal to trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state. Demonstrates optimal strategy for completing the investigation.

TEST_3.test_description: Spirit AI and detection testing. Validates that hostile spirits patrol properly, detect the player within their vision range, and chase the player appropriately.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Deliberately move into a spirit's vision cone to trigger detection. Test if spirits chase the player correctly. Verify line-of-sight mechanics and detection range. Test if losing line-of-sight causes spirits to stop chasing.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Spirits patrol their routes when player is not detected. When player enters vision range, spirits detect and begin chasing. Chase mechanics work correctly with appropriate speed. Game over triggers when spirit catches player.
